<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #mistralai-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="mistralai-logo">
    <title>Mistral AI</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M17.143 3.429v3.428h-3.429v3.429h-3.428V6.857H6.857V3.43H3.43v13.714H0v3.428h10.286v-3.428H6.857v-3.429h3.429v3.429h3.429v-3.429h3.428v3.429h-3.428v3.428H24v-3.428h-3.43V3.429z" />
    </g>
</svg>
